news.t: Infrastructure Capital Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase
Infrastructure Capital Advisors Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase: the Infracap Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP)

holdings.infoBox: SCAP is an equity ETF with a total of 123 individual holdings. The top holdings are Toll Brothers stock at 4.38%, StoneX Group at 3.74%, Hudbay Minerals at 3.68%, Moog Inc. at 3.55%, and Herc Holdings at 3.50%.

overview.description: The Infrastructure Capital Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively and primarily invests in a broad and diverse portfolio of small-cap companies globally. Stock selection is based on quantitative, qualitative, and relative valuation factors. SCAP was launched on Dec 11, 2023 and is issued by InfraCap.

data.title: Infrastructure Capital Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Infrastructure Capital is announcing a dividend increase for the SCAP ETF and the ICAP ETF.

data.title: Infrastructure Capital Declares Monthly Dividends
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Infrastructure Capital is declaring monthly dividends for three of its Exchange Traded Funds ("ETFs"), tickers BNDS, SCAP and ICAP.

data.title: Infrastructure Capital Advisors Announces a Quarterly Dividend Increase: the Infracap Small Cap Income ETF (SCAP)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--InfraCap announces dividend increase for Small Cap Income ETF (NYSE Arca: SCAP). Monthly distribution for June increased from $0.175 to $0.180.
